Name: Label
Description: A display label for the ConceptualVariableScheme.

Name: ConceptualVariableSchemeReference
Description: Reference to an existing ConceptualVariableScheme for inclusion. TypeOfObject should be set to a ConceptualVariableScheme.

Name: ConceptualVariableReference
Description: Describes a ConceptualVariable which provides the link between a concept to a specific unit type (object) that defines this as a ConceptualVariable.

Name: ConceptualVariableGroupReference
Description: Allows for grouping of ConceptualVariables for administrative or conceptual purposes; groups may have a hierarchical structure.
